<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/27.0.5 Chrome/134.0.6998.205 Electron/35.3.0 Safari/537.36" scale="1" border="0" version="27.0.5"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="g3vqE7-Gjzh4NsCAyGIG"> <mxGraphModel dx="1090" dy="833" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0" adaptiveColors="auto"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="f9RKJHTwRrqyXjTHDluF-1" value="

Arduino + Relay Module &

id="f9RKJHTwRrqyXjTHDluF-7" value="GPIB Control" style="curved=1;startArrow=none;endArrow=block;strokeWidth=3;exitX=1;exitY=0.75;entryX=0;entryY=0.25;rounded=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;" </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="f9RKJHTwRrqyXjTHDluF-8" value="Switching & Routing"
